reasoning: As of the knowledge cutoff of May 22, 2025, there has been no SEC S-1 filing or official announcement from Databricks regarding IPO plans. In late 2024, the company closed a massive $10 billion funding round (mostly secondary) at a $62 billion valuation, which significantly reduced the immediate pressure for an IPO by providing liquidity to employees and investors. CEO Ali Ghodsi has consistently communicated a cautious timeline, stating in December 2024 and February 2025 that mid-2025 would be the 'earliest' possibility but that a 2026 date was also plausible. While the upcoming Data + AI Summit (June 9-12, 2025) provides a potential platform for major news, there are currently no credible rumors or leaks in the financial press (Bloomberg, CNBC, Reuters) suggesting an imminent filing. Given the lack of momentum and the recent capital injection, the likelihood of a formal announcement before July 1, 2025, is very low.
